title: Verify T22: taskify --ticket flag links task to external ticket
description: Test case T22 verifies that @kody taskify --ticket JIRA-123 creates a task linked to an external ticket ID. Steps: (1) Create temp issue, (2) Trigger @kody taskify --ticket JIRA-123 on the issue, (3) Verify Kody creates a task linked to the ticket ID, (4) Cleanup. The --ticket flag is already implemented in kody-engine - this test validates the end-to-end flow works correctly.
